rationale.2026: Time-specific (current year), eliminates pre-2026 cherry-picked-seeds concern

pass_criteria.description: PF variance across seeds < 20% AND no single seed PF < 1.0

notes: Adding/removing seeds requires an OWNER-approved decision record under decisions/.
Q05/Q06 stress runs use seed 42 (default). Q07 runs all 5 seeds.
Framework consumer: QM_SeedReset(seed) at OnInit via QM_FrameworkInit.
